name: syncSessions
description: Lista sessoes de sync com resumo
code:
SELECT SYNC_SESSION,
      MIN(DATA) AS INICIO, MAX(DATA) AS FIM,
      COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_REQUESTS,
      SUM(TICKETS_COUNT) AS TOTAL_TICKETS,
      SUM(CASE WHEN RESPONSE_CODE >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_ERROS,
      SUM(DURACAO_MS) AS DURACAO_TOTAL_MS
    FROM REQUEST_LOG
    GROUP BY SYNC_SESSION
    ORDER BY INICIO DESC
    LIMIT {{limit}}
